description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a brick lower facade and light gray siding on the upper level. The structure features a prominent gable roof with dark gray shingles and a large central chimney. The front of the house has a symmetrical arrangement of windows and a recessed entryway, flanked by brick columns. On one side, there is an attached two-car garage with a matching gable roof and a small vented dormer. The windows are rectangular and evenly spaced, with white trim that contrasts against the brick and siding. The overall design is practical and traditional, suitable for a residential neighborhood.
description: A two-story suburban house with brick and gray siding, gable roof, central chimney, and attached garage. Symmetrical windows and a recessed entryway define its traditional style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, symmetrical windows, and brick columns.
description_view_1: Garage-side view highlighting the double garage doors, small dormer, and chimney.
description_view_2: Rear/side view displaying the extended brick wall, back door, and upper-level windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side of the garage and the plain gable end.
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed central entry with brick columns, small steps, and a simple overhang.
